brandStrengthRationale: The color signals are a chaotic mix of saturated oranges, multiple blues, a hot pink, and neon yellow — none of which form a cohesive system. The blues (#0a7aff, #4280ff, #0866ff) appear to be Facebook/social widget artifacts rather than intentional brand colors, and the presence of #f00075 and #fefc00 alongside aggressive oranges suggests no deliberate palette was ever applied.
evolutionSignal: rebuild — the current brand has no coherent visual identity to evolve from. The name and tagline ('Healthy Smiles,' '8,000+ smiles treated since 2005') offer usable brand equity, but the visual execution is effectively absent. A rebuild from the ground up is warranted.
rationale: OC Healthy Smiles has a credible practice history and a clear name but zero cohesive visual brand to speak of. The color set is almost entirely noise — social media widget injections and one-off hex values rather than a designed palette. No typography signals were recoverable. The Brand Direction step is starting from scratch on the visual identity and should treat the practice longevity and community positioning as the primary brand equity to build around.
